originalTitle: The AI trade is remaking the global stock-market order
summary: To truly understand the scale of this AI rally, look no further than South Korea.
content: To truly understand the scale of this AI rally, look no further than South Korea.
chineseTitle: AI 交易正在重塑全球股市秩序
chineseSummary: 要真正了解这场人工智能集会的规模，韩国就是最好的例子。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
